# autClaw Docs

> autClaw deployment and plugin SDK documentation. Use these pages to deploy autClaw on Linux/Docker and write JavaScript or Python plugins.

## Start

- Home: /index
- Deploy autClaw: /getting-started/deploy
- Upgrade autClaw: /getting-started/upgrade
- Runtime paths: /getting-started/runtime-paths

## Plugin SDK

- Overview: /plugin-sdk/overview
- Manifest headers: /plugin-sdk/manifest
- JavaScript middleware reference: /plugin-sdk/javascript
- Python middleware reference: /plugin-sdk/python
- Media sending: /plugin-sdk/media
- AI and MCP retrieval: /plugin-sdk/ai
- TypeScript declaration: /plugin-sdk/types/middleware-js.d.ts
- Manifest schema: /plugin-sdk/schemas/plugin-manifest.schema.json
- Runtime payload schema: /plugin-sdk/schemas/middleware-runtime.schema.json

## Retrieval rules

- Search first, then read only the matching page or section.
- Prefer `/plugin-sdk/javascript` for JavaScript signatures and examples.
- Prefer `/plugin-sdk/python` for Python signatures, return bodies, and parity notes.
- Prefer schemas/types when exact field names matter.
- Do not call autClaw runtime APIs directly from plugins; use `middleware.js` or `middleware.py`.
